description: The search domains Domain Generation Algorithm (DGA). Includes DBotScore and domain information.

outputs.description: The domain that was checked. AnomaliEnterprise.DGA.malware_family The malware family associated with the domain.
outputs.name: AnomaliEnterprise.DGA.domain

outputs.description: The probability of the domain being malicious. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: AnomaliEnterprise.DGA.domain

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score. Domain.Name The domain name. For example, "google.com".
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The vendor that reported that the domain is malicious. Domain.Malicious.Description A description of the malicious domain.
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Vendor
